installCommand: curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal && . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && curl https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh -sSf | sh && cd wasm && wasm-pack build --release --scope=gengjiawen && cd .. && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
